comment: En tant que startup, Pipedrive a été un excellent CRM pour notre entreprise. Sa conception conviviale et ses options personnalisables pour la gestion des pipelines et des flux de travail m'en ont facilité l'utilisation. Malgré des problèmes mineurs, j'ai trouvé que Pipedrive était un CRM efficace et efficace.

title: Transformer les ventes avec Pipedrive : avantages et inconvénients

comment: Globalement l'expérience de Pipedrive est bonne. J'avais un profil novice sur les CRM et j'ai facilement pu le prendre en main.On peut, grâce aux rapports pré-définis avoir accès à des metrics intéressante pour analyser nos ventes. Mais cela pourrait aller un peu plus loin.Il y a certainement des améliorations à faire côté ergonomie. Et notamment pour faire des passations entre des équipes Sales -> CS (ce qui a commencé à être fait avec l'arrivée de "projects").

comment: Bonne expérience générale. L'outil est bien, il fait le job.

comment: Personnalement, j'ai utilisé Mailchimp durant mon travail dans une entreprise qui diffuse des nouvelles sous forme d'articles dans le secteur de l'informatique.Principalement, Mailchimp nous a aidé afin d'envoyer des newsletters à nos utilisateurs chaque semaine.Donc, Mailchimp nous a permit de créer et configurer facilements des emails créatifs (par des personnes qui n'ont pas un profil technique/informatique).Ainsi, Mailchimp nous a donné de nombreuses analyses qui permettent aux équipes de Marketing de définir des prochaines étapes.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 1 à 5 mois
title: Outil pour concevoir des emails creatifs et rapides

date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus de deux ans

comment: Bonne expérience générale. L'outil est bien, il fait le job.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus d'un an

comment: Personnalement, j'ai utilisé Mailchimp durant mon travail dans une entreprise qui diffuse des nouvelles sous forme d'articles dans le secteur de l'informatique.Principalement, Mailchimp nous a aidé afin d'envoyer des newsletters à nos utilisateurs chaque semaine.Donc, Mailchimp nous a permit de créer et configurer facilements des emails créatifs (par des personnes qui n'ont pas un profil technique/informatique).Ainsi, Mailchimp nous a donné de nombreuses analyses qui permettent aux équipes de Marketing de définir des prochaines étapes.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 1 à 5 mois

comment: Ce que j'ai le moins apprécié dans Zendesk Suite, c'est que certaines fonctionnalités avancées, telles que l'intégration avec d'autres outils, nécessitent des abonnements à des niveaux de tarification plus élevés, ce qui peut être coûteux pour les petites entreprises. De plus, l'interface utilisateur pourrait être améliorée pour une navigation plus intuitive et une meilleure convivialité. Cependant, malgré ces points négatifs, Zendesk Suite reste une solution complète pour la gestion du support client.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 1 à 5 mois

comment: Je suis totalement dégouté de cette entreprise. J'ai eu une offre d'essai startup afin de tester le produit et voir la valeur de l'outil. Les codes fournis pour la réduction ont mal fonctionné, j'ai donc mis du temps à mettre en place l'outil. Ensuite au bout de 6 mois, pas de mail de notification, il est compliqué d'avoir un Sales disponible. J'ai résilié et 2 mois après, à ma grande surprise ils m'ont débité 2,x 222 € !!!! pour un outil que je n'ai pas utilisé et que j'ai résilié. J'ai fait un ticket support et ça a mis 1 mois pour avoir un retour ! (ZENDESK vend des solutions de gesetion de client et support et leur niveau interne est proche du néant, j'ai rarement vu autant de médiocrité).
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 1 à 5 mois
title: Inadmissible leur gestion des clients !

date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus de deux ans
title: Attention au renouvellement automatique

comment: Je suis totalement dégouté de cette entreprise. J'ai eu une offre d'essai startup afin de tester le produit et voir la valeur de l'outil. Les codes fournis pour la réduction ont mal fonctionné, j'ai donc mis du temps à mettre en place l'outil. Ensuite au bout de 6 mois, pas de mail de notification, il est compliqué d'avoir un Sales disponible. J'ai résilié et 2 mois après, à ma grande surprise ils m'ont débité 2,x 222 € !!!! pour un outil que je n'ai pas utilisé et que j'ai résilié. J'ai fait un ticket support et ça a mis 1 mois pour avoir un retour ! (ZENDESK vend des solutions de gesetion de client et support et leur niveau interne est proche du néant, j'ai rarement vu autant de médiocrité).

comment: It is simple to keep track of contacts and quickly access their information, as well as add notes to remind me of important details. Furthermore, the capability to sync with other services allows me to quickly add new contacts to my database.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus d'un an
title: Review of Nimble

comment: Nimble is an amazing software. It is not a classical CRM. Is is more like a core segmentation data base which can make core emailings and which is linked to social networks. The customer support is perfect. For beginners it's need a certain learning curve. Happily videos are understandable and they have free webinars once a week, where you can ask questions. Our company, Aristone-conseil (www.aristoneconseil.fr) is a French broker and asset-manager specialised in investments about corporate (business) real estate assets. Our clients are investors and crucial. As we acquire and sell buildings for them, we want to give them the best service possible. So we trust and indeed use Nimble for staying linked to our clients. There is a crucial fonction which reminds you at certain time when to pay attention to our clients and it's easy to make any segmentations. This help us to quickly and efficiently answer to their needs. Nimble's approach definitivly is a new way of making you stay focus on what matters the most in life and business ie people and especially our clients. We love it !
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : Non fourni
title: NIMBLE the core tool for finding and following clients

comment: I switched to Nimble a couple of months ago and so far it works as intended .
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 1 à 5 mois
title: A fluid platform that gives you a lot of flexibility .

comment: A very good solution that works well and give good performances.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 6 à 12 mois
title: Nimble (HPe) Storage, a real win

comment: I am American, and living in France. Nimble has eased my customer contact considerably and I really appreciate that. However, NIMBLE does not adapt to French, for example, takes out all letters with accents, and is also very computer-centric, - 'last contacted' for example, only concerns emails, and not phone calls or handwritten notes. As for customer service, I find that their responses are complicated, not clear. Filling in NIMBLE is not my priority, it is just a tool, so I think the CSRs should allow for nonnative users.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : Non fourni
title: Nimble is good, but amero-centric, computer centric, and too bad about FB

comment: Nimble is by far the best CRM I have ever used, particularly the close integration with social media is highly appreciated.

comment: En tant que startup, Pipedrive a été un excellent CRM pour notre entreprise. Sa conception conviviale et ses options personnalisables pour la gestion des pipelines et des flux de travail m'en ont facilité l'utilisation. Malgré des problèmes mineurs, j'ai trouvé que Pipedrive était un CRM efficace et efficace.

comment: Globalement l'expérience de Pipedrive est bonne. J'avais un profil novice sur les CRM et j'ai facilement pu le prendre en main.On peut, grâce aux rapports pré-définis avoir accès à des metrics intéressante pour analyser nos ventes. Mais cela pourrait aller un peu plus loin.Il y a certainement des améliorations à faire côté ergonomie. Et notamment pour faire des passations entre des équipes Sales -> CS (ce qui a commencé à être fait avec l'arrivée de "projects").

title: Réseautage et collaboration efficaces

comment: It is simple to keep track of contacts and quickly access their information, as well as add notes to remind me of important details. Furthermore, the capability to sync with other services allows me to quickly add new contacts to my database.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus d'un an
title: Review of Nimble

comment: Nimble is an amazing software. It is not a classical CRM. Is is more like a core segmentation data base which can make core emailings and which is linked to social networks. The customer support is perfect. For beginners it's need a certain learning curve. Happily videos are understandable and they have free webinars once a week, where you can ask questions. Our company, Aristone-conseil (www.aristoneconseil.fr) is a French broker and asset-manager specialised in investments about corporate (business) real estate assets. Our clients are investors and crucial. As we acquire and sell buildings for them, we want to give them the best service possible. So we trust and indeed use Nimble for staying linked to our clients. There is a crucial fonction which reminds you at certain time when to pay attention to our clients and it's easy to make any segmentations. This help us to quickly and efficiently answer to their needs. Nimble's approach definitivly is a new way of making you stay focus on what matters the most in life and business ie people and especially our clients. We love it !
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : Non fourni
title: NIMBLE the core tool for finding and following clients

comment: I switched to Nimble a couple of months ago and so far it works as intended .
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 1 à 5 mois
title: A fluid platform that gives you a lot of flexibility .

comment: A very good solution that works well and give good performances.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 6 à 12 mois
title: Nimble (HPe) Storage, a real win

comment: I am American, and living in France. Nimble has eased my customer contact considerably and I really appreciate that. However, NIMBLE does not adapt to French, for example, takes out all letters with accents, and is also very computer-centric, - 'last contacted' for example, only concerns emails, and not phone calls or handwritten notes. As for customer service, I find that their responses are complicated, not clear. Filling in NIMBLE is not my priority, it is just a tool, so I think the CSRs should allow for nonnative users.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : Non fourni
title: Nimble is good, but amero-centric, computer centric, and too bad about FB

comment: Nimble is by far the best CRM I have ever used, particularly the close integration with social media is highly appreciated.

comment: Before I used HoneyBook, I had tried several other client management platforms. All of them were clunky, and often I'd have to hunt around for things in the interest of the app developer's attention to folders and organization. What a mess! I'm so glad I switched to HoneyBook. They've consistently made product improvements and seem to really care about their customers. It gets easier and more fun to use every day, with just enough features to accomplish what I need without overwhelming me. I highly suggest this to anyone who is managing multiple clients, especially if you have client projects that tend to go dormant for awhile then pick back up.

I don't have to give a laundry-list of payment methods or pay for additional payment services, wait around for physical checks, or process e-checks. My customers just plop in their card information and then it hits my bank account. SO. NICE.

comment: I no longer have to keep paper copies of contracts or invoices. Honeybook reminds me of who needs to pay, who has paid, who I have to follow up with. I can save email templates which saves me so much time. Overall, I can do business more effectively in less time! That's huge for me.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus d'un an
title: Honeybook Is Amazing!

comment: The main benefit of HoneyBook that I love is that I'm able to give my clients an exceptional experience. The way contracts are shared, payments are presented makes it so easy for me to do business with my clients. I think the biggest perk I loved at first was the electronic signature. It's seamless and allows you to pull in more clients quicker. It also keeps my voice consistent with different clients. I can have automated responses ready to send. The price was worth it to me to get my sanity back!
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus d'un an

comment: En tant que startup, Pipedrive a été un excellent CRM pour notre entreprise. Sa conception conviviale et ses options personnalisables pour la gestion des pipelines et des flux de travail m'en ont facilité l'utilisation. Malgré des problèmes mineurs, j'ai trouvé que Pipedrive était un CRM efficace et efficace.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus d'un an

comment: Mon expérience globale avec Pipedrive a été positive. Je crois que cela m'a aidé à rationaliser mon processus de vente et à rester au top de mes tâches.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 6 à 12 mois
title: Transformer les ventes avec Pipedrive : avantages et inconvénients

comment: Globalement l'expérience de Pipedrive est bonne. J'avais un profil novice sur les CRM et j'ai facilement pu le prendre en main.On peut, grâce aux rapports pré-définis avoir accès à des metrics intéressante pour analyser nos ventes. Mais cela pourrait aller un peu plus loin.Il y a certainement des améliorations à faire côté ergonomie. Et notamment pour faire des passations entre des équipes Sales -> CS (ce qui a commencé à être fait avec l'arrivée de "projects").
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 6 à 12 mois
title: Pipedrive : un CRM simple à appréhender !

comment: J'utilise Nimble depuis plus d'un an maintenant, et c'est devenu un outil essentiel pour mon entreprise.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 6 à 12 mois
title: Réseautage et collaboration efficaces

comment: It is simple to keep track of contacts and quickly access their information, as well as add notes to remind me of important details. Furthermore, the capability to sync with other services allows me to quickly add new contacts to my database.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus d'un an
title: Review of Nimble

comment: Nimble is an amazing software. It is not a classical CRM. Is is more like a core segmentation data base which can make core emailings and which is linked to social networks. The customer support is perfect. For beginners it's need a certain learning curve. Happily videos are understandable and they have free webinars once a week, where you can ask questions. Our company, Aristone-conseil (www.aristoneconseil.fr) is a French broker and asset-manager specialised in investments about corporate (business) real estate assets. Our clients are investors and crucial. As we acquire and sell buildings for them, we want to give them the best service possible. So we trust and indeed use Nimble for staying linked to our clients. There is a crucial fonction which reminds you at certain time when to pay attention to our clients and it's easy to make any segmentations. This help us to quickly and efficiently answer to their needs. Nimble's approach definitivly is a new way of making you stay focus on what matters the most in life and business ie people and especially our clients. We love it !
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : Non fourni
title: NIMBLE the core tool for finding and following clients

comment: I switched to Nimble a couple of months ago and so far it works as intended .
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 1 à 5 mois
title: A fluid platform that gives you a lot of flexibility .

comment: A very good solution that works well and give good performances.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 6 à 12 mois
title: Nimble (HPe) Storage, a real win

comment: I am American, and living in France. Nimble has eased my customer contact considerably and I really appreciate that. However, NIMBLE does not adapt to French, for example, takes out all letters with accents, and is also very computer-centric, - 'last contacted' for example, only concerns emails, and not phone calls or handwritten notes. As for customer service, I find that their responses are complicated, not clear. Filling in NIMBLE is not my priority, it is just a tool, so I think the CSRs should allow for nonnative users.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : Non fourni
title: Nimble is good, but amero-centric, computer centric, and too bad about FB

comment: Nimble is by far the best CRM I have ever used, particularly the close integration with social media is highly appreciated.

comment: Before I used HoneyBook, I had tried several other client management platforms. All of them were clunky, and often I'd have to hunt around for things in the interest of the app developer's attention to folders and organization. What a mess! I'm so glad I switched to HoneyBook. They've consistently made product improvements and seem to really care about their customers. It gets easier and more fun to use every day, with just enough features to accomplish what I need without overwhelming me. I highly suggest this to anyone who is managing multiple clients, especially if you have client projects that tend to go dormant for awhile then pick back up.

In addition, they outsource their calls to individuals who can barely speak English and who do not have a clue how their system works. In addition, I pay for both the billing program and EHR. Was told that my monthly bill would be around $400 for both since I have a very small medical practice. Bill immediately jumped to over $680 per month. When I asked for an explanation, was told that needed to contact another department to get an invoice. Have repeatedly asked for a written explanation of why my bill is so high. Everytime my staff or I have tried to call them, we go into permahold. You can't get ahold of anyone who knows anything about their system. I am convinced that they hire people off the streets and don't really train them. In addition, they outsource their calls to individuals who can barely speak English and who do not have a clue how their system works. In addition, I pay for both the billing program and EHR. Was told that my monthly bill would be around $400 for both since I have a very small medical practice. Bill immediately jumped to over $680 per month. When I asked for an explanation, was told that needed to contact another department to get an invoice. Have repeatedly asked for a written explanation of why my bill is so high. Never have received any answers. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] were not helpful. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] was actually very rude to my staff. I overheard him making rude comments to my MA. When we tried to utilize our 3 months of "coaching" they never had time to help us. I even tried reaching out to the [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] and he ignored my concerns. We are now slowly muddling our way thru this mess
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 1 à 5 mois

comment: It has been an absolute nightmare. Customer support has been zero. For over 2 months couldn't use the electronic prescribing system due to problems with the Kareo system. They stated that it was the Doctor.Me program I was required to use. Wasn't. Called my son. He checked into it and told me how to fix it. Was fixed in minutes after 2 months of being ignored. Everytime my staff or I have tried to call them, we go into permahold. You can't get ahold of anyone who knows anything about their system. I am convinced that they hire people off the streets and don't really train them. In addition, they outsource their calls to individuals who can barely speak English and who do not have a clue how their system works. In addition, I pay for both the billing program and EHR. Was told that my monthly bill would be around $400 for both since I have a very small medical practice. Bill immediately jumped to over $680 per month. When I asked for an explanation, was told that needed to contact another department to get an invoice. Have repeatedly asked for a written explanation of why my bill is so high. Never have received any answers. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] were not helpful. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] was actually very rude to my staff. I overheard him making rude comments to my MA. When we tried to utilize our 3 months of "coaching" they never had time to help us. I even tried reaching out to the [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] and he ignored my concerns. We are now slowly muddling our way thru this mess

comment: J’ai une bonne expérience globale avec Gitlab. En effet, il offre un service complet et solide de gestion de code et bien plus encore. Il améliore la collaboration sur les différents code source de l’entreprise grâce à ses systèmes de code reviews. C’est un indispensable a avoir. Il est aussi très pratique du fait de son intégration avec le logiciel de gestion de tickets Jira. Ce qui permet de créer des automatisations.
